evidenceSnippetOriginal: If you are considering procuring a generative AI tool not currently offered or have questions, please contact HUIT. All vendor generative AI tools must be assessed for risk by Harvard's Information Security and Data Privacy office prior to use in Harvard work.
evidenceLocator: Use approved tools for Harvard work section
